next.name: UFC Fight Night 281 Du Plessis vs Usman
next.desc: An electric atmosphere takes over the Paycom Center as the Octagon returns to Oklahoma for UFC Fight Night 281, headlined by a legacy-defining middleweight war between former divisional kingpin Dricus du Plessis and former dominant welterweight ruler Kamaru Usman. The primary hurdle for both elite mixed martial artists is navigating the extreme strategic layers of a true cross-divisional chess match, where du Plessis must neutralize his opponent's legendary wrestling base while Usman handles the jarring transition to a heavier weight class. The objective for the South African powerhouse is to dictate a grueling, chaotic pace from the center of the cage, weaponizing his signature physical blitzes to compromise Usman's legendary defensive shell. Concurrently, the mission for Nigeria's "Nigerian Nightmare" centers on executing a clinical tactical masterclass behind his sharp, piston-like jab, blending timed level changes with heavy top control to stifle the former champion's explosive output and instantly assert himself as a premium contender in the 185-pound landscape.

last.name: UFC 329 McGregor vs Holloway 2
last.desc:
Nearly 13 years after their initial encounter in 2013—long before either man captured UFC gold—Conor "The Notorious" McGregor and Max "Blessed" Holloway meet again. This blockbuster clash marks McGregor's highly awaited return to the Octagon since suffering a leg injury in 2021, while also serving as Holloway's official competitive debut in the welterweight division following his spectacular BMF title run.  

The co-main event promises fireworks as fan-favorite Paddy "The Baddy" Pimblett takes on the dangerous French finisher Benoît Saint Denis in a crucial lightweight matchup.
